title: Fix congress UI left pane layout duplication

log.context: Fix congress UI left pane layout duplication

Done. Here's what changed in `/mnt/data/hello-world/congress.html`:

**Removed:**
- The entire right sidebar (`sidebar-right`) that showed the Severance panel
- The `renderSeverance()` function (it only served the now-removed right sidebar)
- The `renderSeverance()` call from `render()`
- Dropped the grid from 3-column (`240px 1fr 210px`) to 2-column (`240px 1fr`)

**Updated:**
- "Full Panel" section label renamed to "Active"
- Left-pane Severance section now includes the reinstate button (`↑`) ...(truncated)
